script:
set +e
echo '=== mskai-responder.py lines 870-935 (worker pool) ==='; sed -n '870,935p' /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== mskai-responder.py lines 800-870 (handle_activity caller) ==='; sed -n '800,870p' /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== mskai-responder.py grep handle_activity definitions ==='; grep -n 'def handle_activity\|def main\|def loop\|workers\[' /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== END ==='
